title: Pixel 3a OS Rebuild (google-sargo)
summary: Build a ground-up OS image for Google Pixel 3a (sargo) using postmarketOS edge; prepare flashable images and execute flashing once device is in fastboot. Includes environment audit, build config, and background build.

tracking.now: pmbootstrap install (v3.10.1) running in project workdir; chroot prep started; mirrors fixed; waiting for rootfs/images
tracking.next: Monitor build to completion; if success, export images and prep fastboot flashing; in parallel, enable ADB or provide SSH creds for device checks
blocked: Awaiting SSH credentials or ADB authorization
done: Upgraded pmbootstrap to 3.10.1 in project tools and preseeded config (device/ui/work).

control.delivery_target: Flashable postmarketOS edge images for Pixel 3a (sargo) prepared and flashed
acceptance: Live pmbootstrap log shows install starting with google-sargo config and project workdir active
